sql_array: CREATE TABLE triangles (cathetus1 Float64, cathetus2 Float64, hypotenuse Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY hypotenuse;
INSERT INTO triangles (cathetus1, cathetus2, hypotenuse) VALUES (3.0, 4.0, hypot(3.0, 4.0));
INSERT INTO triangles (cathetus1, cathetus2, hypotenuse) VALUES (5.0, 12.0, hypot(5.0, 12.0));
UPDATE triangles SET hypotenuse = hypot(cathetus1, cathetus2) WHERE cathetus1 = 3.0 AND cathetus2 = 4.0;
SELECT cathetus1, cathetus2, hypotenuse FROM triangles WHERE hypotenuse > 5.0;
